name: GrabPay
description: GrabPay — Southeast Asia digital wallet by Grab covering Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Philippines, and Indonesia with QR and online payments.

seo.title: GrabPay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: GrabPay: GrabPay — Southeast Asia digital wallet by Grab covering Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Philippines, and Indonesia with QR and online payments.

when_to_use: SEA digital wallet payment for merchants in Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand
QR and online payment acceptance via GrabPay across Southeast Asia
GrabPay wallet API integration for Philippine and Indonesian e-commerce
Embedded GrabPay checkout for super app and platform developers in SEA

cons: Not a full gateway — wallet rail
review.verdict: Useful wallet coverage across SEA — include it in your stack, but don't treat it as a standalone gateway.
review.best_for: Merchants selling across Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Philippines, Indonesia
review.not_for: Businesses outside SEA or wanting card-first processing

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
